title: Income Tax: ITR-3 Excel Utility released — should taxpayers wait until August or file their returns early?
summary: The income tax return (ITR)-3 is meant for individuals and HUFs who have income from business or profession. Interestingly, the last date of filing tax return via ITR-3 is 31 August and not 31 July.&nbsp;

title: SEBI introduces new Gold ETF trading framework with dynamic price bands from 1 September; check details
summary: Big changes ahead for Gold ETFs as SEBI introduces a new trading framework from September 1. Dynamic price bands, pre-open auctions and revised pricing rules aim to improve price discovery, transparency and investor protection in Gold and Silver ETFs.

title: Women saw 145% salary jump from transition into AI-enabled careers, finds report — see which jobs gave highest gains
summary: Artificial intelligence has accelerated women's rise in the technology space, according to the India AI Workforce Report by Scaler. They reported 145% salary increase after transitioning into AI-enabled careers, it added.

title: Rupee records strongest week in 11 as bond inflows, softer oil prices lend support
summary: The Indian rupee maintained steady ground against the dollar last Friday, closing almost flat. The day’s trading featured some ups and downs, yet the rupee celebrated its best weekly performance in eleven weeks, thanks to a surge in foreign investments into Indian markets.
